column6: Frühdienst: Reduced appetite, Mild dyspnea on exertion, No acute pain reported. Interventions: Vital signs checked, Medication administered as prescribed. Evaluation: Patient cooperative.

Spätdienst: Called staff multiple times during the night, Pain score 5/10 in surgical area, Mobilization possible only with two staff members. Interventions: Vital signs checked, Fluid balance documented, Mobilized in corridor with walker, PRN medication given after consultation. Evaluation: Therapy adjustment ordered by physician.

Frühdienst: Fluid intake below 1 liter, Reduced appetite, Intermittently disoriented to situation, Called staff multiple times during the night. Interventions: Mobilized in corridor with walker, Medication administered as prescribed, Mobilized to bedside, Physician informed about condition. Evaluation: Therapy adjustment ordered by physician.
